The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. The dog barked loudly at the fox.
This is a simple test document for text analysis. It contains multiple sentences with
various words. Some words repeat frequently while others appear only once.

The analysis should detect that common words like "the" and "is" appear multiple times.
Meanwhile, words like "jumps" and "barked" are less frequent. The sentiment is mostly
neutral with no strong positive or negative indicators.

This final paragraph adds more text for statistical analysis. The vocabulary diversity
should be moderate given the repetition of common English words throughout the document.
